title: M.V. Trading MTP5RS Marble Pestle Replacement Stick, 5-Inch Long
description:
About this item
This is a wonderful tool to use to prepare dished where spice is a critical component, such as curries
The pestle is a heavy bat-shaped tool, whose end is used for pounding and grinding and the mortar is the bowl and both are made of marble
This bowl style marble grinder is also known as a mortar and pestle, and is a tool used to crush, grind and mix herbs and recipe ingredients
Excellent for bringing flavor out of seeds, nuts and spices
Originated from Taiwan
reviews_5s: Came fast and looks greatBeautiful variation in the three replacement Pestles I ordered due to the natural marbling. Excellent quality, exactly what I was hoping for. Thank youAlmost a perfect match for a mortar and pestle set we've had forever, the pestle to which rolled off the counter and broke. My husband has been gluing the dang thing together for half a decade because he loved the set and it never even occurred to us that we could possibly buy the pieces individually, let alone matching so well. On a whim I looked up "pestle replacement" and found this at a great price, right at the top of the list. It looks just right, and has a good weight and shape.I use this both for cooking as well as grinding down medication that's hard to swallow ~ it cleans up beautifullyPestle that matched my mortor that I use to grind up the pills my dog takes that he can't chew. It will grind anything I.e. spices, pills, grains etc. Iost my original and this one is a perfect replacement!This one actually matched my mortar better than the one that broke good size smooth and easy to handle.This was what I ordered but AMAZON put it in one of their BAGS instead of a BOX and, even though it was bubble wrapped, it broke, therefore, I had to return it. It is a SMOOTH Marble Pestle. My husband broke the one to our small mortar pestle.Great for my mortar that I bought at a yard saleMy daughter found an old mortar and I was worried I wouldn't be able to find a matching pestle. This one matches and it's large and works well.Such a beautiful & good replacement. My marble pestle broke from being dropped on tile floor. It was pricey, but the only 1 that I could find. The mortar is worthless with it.
reviews_1s: I had another pestle which broke, So bought this to replace it. But it chipped and a huge piece broke off. I tried to use the other end, it too started to chip and small pieces of it went into food. About a year old. I had the other one for many years and never chipped.The described length is correct but there is no weight to it. Shoulda bought a new set instead.The tip broke after two uses, both used to crush dehydrated basil leaves. Seems like an unfortunate quality issue compared to the original that lasted 20 years. I wish it lasted.Arrived brokenThis is a replacement for a very small mortor. I was bummed to find out that it's not big enough for the replacement of my broken pestle.to fatworst product it will chip of poor qualityI had this prior which fractured so I decided to buy a new one which arrived fractured in the box!!!! Poor quality and will not last!! Don't waste your money!
